metadata.description: Externalizing Cognition — Claude Code plugins for investigation, verification, budget mastery, and cognitive pattern externalization

plugins.name: research-toolkit
plugins.description: Investigation protocols, frame rotation, iterative verification, financial analysis (STONK). Includes bundled MCP servers (relational-memory, edge-graph, financial-mcp).

plugins.name: budget-mastery
plugins.description: Budget-conscious agent identity — efficiency as capability, not constraint. Identity-level internalization of budget awareness.

plugins.name: vasana-system
plugins.description: Pattern-behavior externalization — iterative loops, temporal shaping, self-improvement agents, vasana creation and testing.
